LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ORDER DETERMINING GOOD FAITH OF SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SETTLEMENT WAS MADE IN GOOD FAITH UNDER CCP 877.6 UNDER THE TECH BUILT TEST. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Off Calendar

Notcie Of Motion Andmotion For Order Determining Goof Faith Of Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ZACHARY S. TOLSON OF THE LAW OFFICES OF GOODMAN NEUMAN HAMILTON LLP, TEL. NO. 705-0417 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. BRADLEY A. RUSSI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3964 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CCSF;
ATTY. JILL L. BATES-MOORE OF THE PHILIP M. ANDERSEN & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (925) 225-6838 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT ANA ROBIERO BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING CONTINUING THE MATTER AND HEARD THE MATTER ON THE MERITS DUE TO THE RECEIPT OF THE OPPOSITION BY WAY OF E-MAIL. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Of Settlement IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SETTLEMENT WAS MADE IN GOOD FAITH UNDER CCP 877.6 UNDER THE TECH BUILT TEST. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
